name: Patient 17
history: Long-term relationship with Amelia who has demanding schedule. Sarah feels isolated, does most household tasks without discussing resentment. Childhood separation trauma.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: If I ask for more, Amelia will leave me like my parents did.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm destined to be alone doing all the work.
situation: Doing laundry and thinking about relationship future and domestic role.
auto_thought: "I'm just the housekeeper. She doesn't really see me. I'm alone in this."
behavior: Does laundry aggressively, sighs loudly hoping Amelia notices, but doesn't communicate.
